name: mrzmyr-plugin
description: Skills for TypeScript code review, skeptical implementation review, and terse communication.

interface.shortDescription: TypeScript, deslop, and terse communication skills
interface.longDescription: Skills for applying TypeScript naming, parameter, error logging, and file-context principles; skeptical review of fallbacks, regex matching, custom code, and type assertions; plus ultra-compressed communication that preserves technical accuracy.
defaultPrompt: Review this TypeScript code with typescript-principles.
Use deslop to review this implementation.
Use caveman for a terse answer.
